meta.title: About Us - PT. Property Group Imperium
meta.description: Learn about PT. Property Group Imperium, Indonesia's leading property development and management company with three specialized business divisions.

hero.title: About PT. Property Group Imperium
hero.description: A legacy of excellence in Indonesian real estate

story.title: About Us
story.subtitle: Imperium (Latin: Imperium)
story.definition: Defined as a great empire occupying a vast geographical area. Under the leadership of a powerful ruler, leading a solid team in their nation.
story.content:
Founded in 2006, PT. Property Group Imperium (PGI) is a property company located in Medan - North Sumatra. As a leading and prestigious property developer, the company's main focus is to build & develop quality residential and commercial properties.

As a property sector developer, we are committed to creating environmentally friendly projects oriented towards customer satisfaction. We consistently strive to improve our strategies in meeting relevant and evolving property needs.

Since our initial projects, PT. Property Group Imperium has consistently demonstrated a commitment to being the best in the property industry.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To become one of the best and most trusted developers initiating leading residences in the property industry, with high investment value.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To initiate and build projects that are "Conceptual & Innovative" according to the era and generation following the times.

values.title: Business Values
values.subtitle: What Drives Us
values.description: The principles that shape how we build, partner, and serve our clients every day.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: With a reputation for ethical behavior built over more than a decade, our company culture is one that treats everyone equally with respect, trust, and honor without exception.

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.description: Our company welcomes new ideas, innovative projects, and unique perspectives that inspire creativity and smart property solutions.

longterm.title: Long-Term Focus
longterm.description: Our long-term investment horizon stems from a combination of patience and a consistency mindset. We value detailed planning and a future that involves positive environmental impact.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Quality cares about details, recognizing the importance of superior design and professionalism in management. We set properties with the highest targets and best-in-class service.

organization.title: Organizational Structure
organization.subtitle: Leadership & management
organization.description: The people guiding PT. Property Group Imperium—executive leadership and management roles.

property.name: PGI Property
property.description: PGI Property specializes in comprehensive property management services, ensuring your assets are maintained to the highest standards. We handle everything from tenant relations to maintenance, maximizing your property's value and returns.

contractor.name: PGI Contractor
contractor.description: PGI Contractor delivers exceptional construction services with a focus on quality, safety, and timely delivery. From commercial buildings to residential complexes, we bring your architectural visions to life.

developer.name: PGI Developer
developer.description: PGI Developer creates innovative real estate projects that blend modern design with functional excellence. We develop premium residential and commercial properties that set new standards in luxury living.

meta.title: Contact Us - PT. Property Group Imperium
